noProjectSelected: No project selected. Please select a time series project.
timestampColumnHelp: Column index for timestamps (default: 0 = first column)
csvFormatInfo: CSV format: First column should be timestamps, remaining columns are values. Example: time,value1,value2
noSeriesSelected: No time series selected. Please select a series from the gallery.
importCSVToStart: Import a CSV file to get started
deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this time series?
noAnnotations: No annotations yet. Select a tool and click on the chart to add annotations.

instructions.point: Click on the chart to mark a point annotation
instructions.range: Click to set start point, then click again to set end point
instructions.event: Click on the chart to mark an event
instructions.anomaly: Click on the chart to mark an anomaly
